opis: Isaac Moriah is the titular main character of The Binding of Isaac, returning from the original 2011 version of the game. Isaac is the only character unlocked by default.

warunek: Have 7 or more Red Heart Containers at one time
opis: Magdalene, or Maggy, is a character unlocked by obtaining seven or more heart containers at once in a run.

warunek: Hold 55 Coins at one time
opis: Cain is a character unlocked by obtaining 55 or more coins at once in a run.

warunek: Defeat Satan
opis: Judas is a character unlocked after beating Satan for the first time. Judas starts with one red heart container, and has The Book of Belial upon starting, as well as 3 coins. Judas also has a 1.35× damage multiplier.

warunek: Defeat Mom's Heart 10 times
Don't pick up any Hearts for 2 floors in a row
opis: Eve is a character unlocked by beating two floors in a row without collecting any hearts. Eve starts with two Red Heart containers, Whore of Babylon, and the Dead Bird.

warunek: Complete 2 floors in a row without taking damage
opis: Samson is a character unlocked by beating two floors in a row without taking any damage.

warunek: Make 3 Deals with the Devil in one run
opis: Azazel is a character unlocked by making three deals with the Devil in one run. Azazel starts with a short-ranged version of Brimstone which deals damage 13 times in one second 9 times in one second, the ability to fly, 0 - The Fool card, and three Black Hearts without any regular Red Heart containers; however, unlike ??? and Dark Judas / Tainted Judas, Azazel can still obtain Red Heart containers with items.

warunek: Have 4 or more Soul Hearts at one time
opis: Lazarus is a character unlocked by having four or more soul hearts (or black hearts) at once during a run. He was introduced in The Binding of Isaac: Rebirth. He starts with three red heart containers and a double-blue pill with an unidentified effect. He has slightly lower Range and Luck than Isaac but also starts with an extra life.

warunek: Complete Chapter 4
opis: Eden is a character in The Binding of Isaac: Rebirth, unlocked by completing Womb for the first time. Eden is unique in that they are only playable when the player has at least one Eden Token. Eden Tokens are awarded every time Mom's Heart, It Lives, Ultra Greed or The Beast is defeated.

warunek: It's complicated Die in a Sacrifice Room while holding
opis: The Lost starts with no health and cannot gain health by any means. Therefore, he will die from any damage taken.

warunek: Defeat Ultra Greed as Azazel
opis: Lilith is a character added in The Binding of Isaac: Afterbirth. Lilith starts with one red heart container and two Black Hearts. Lilith's starting items are the Box of Friends, Incubus, and Cambion Conception. Lilith is permanently blindfolded, meaning she has no ability to fire tears; she instead deals damage with the Incubus familiar that follows her.

warunek: Donate 1000 Coins to the
opis: Keeper is a secret character added in The Binding of Isaac: Afterbirth.

warunek: Defeat Mega Satan
opis: Apollyon is a character added in The Binding of Isaac: Afterbirth †. He is unlocked after defeating Mega Satan for the first time.

warunek: It's complicated
opis: The Forgotten is a secret character added in Booster Pack #5 that resembles a Bony. He cannot fire regular tears, and instead has a bone club that can be swung as a melee weapon or charged to be thrown.

warunek: Defeat Mom's Heart/It Lives! on hard mode as Lazarus, without dying at all
opis: Bethany is a character added in The Binding of Isaac: Repentance. She is unlocked by defeating Mom's Heart or It Lives in hard mode with Lazarus without losing a life.

warunek: Defeat Mother
opis: Jacob and Esau are a character pair added in The Binding of Isaac: Repentance. They are unlocked by defeating Mother with any character.

warunek: Use Red Key (etc.) to open the hidden closet in Home as Isaac
opis: Tainted Isaac is a character added in The Binding of Isaac: Repentance. He is the alternate version of Isaac. Tainted Isaac is unlocked by reaching Home and using the Red Key, Cracked Key, or Soul of Cain to access a special room in one of the walls while playing as Isaac.

warunek: Use Red Key (etc.) to open the hidden closet in Home as Magdalene
opis: Tainted Magdalene is a character added in The Binding of Isaac: Repentance. She is the alternate version of Magdalene with half her hair shaved or ripped off. Tainted Magdalene is unlocked by reaching Home and using the Red Key, Cracked Key, or Soul of Cain to access a special room in one of the walls while playing as Magdalene.

warunek: Use Red Key (etc.) to open the hidden closet in Home as Cain
opis: Tainted Cain is a character added in The Binding of Isaac: Repentance. Tainted Cain is unlocked by reaching Home and using either the Red Key or the Cracked Key to access a special room in one of the walls while playing as Cain. Soul of Cain cannot be used due to its unlock method involving Tainted Cain. He has an identical appearance to Cain, with the exception of a giant bloody wound behind his left eyepatch.

warunek: Use Red Key (etc.) to open the hidden closet in Home as Judas
opis: Tainted Judas is a character added in The Binding of Isaac: Repentance. He is the alternate version of Judas, and has an appearance similar to Dark Judas. Tainted Judas is unlocked by reaching Home and using the Red Key, Cracked Key, or 1=Soul of Cain to access a special room in one of the walls while playing as Judas.

warunek: Use Red Key (etc.) to open the hidden closet in Home as ???
opis: Tainted ??? is a character added in The Binding of Isaac: Repentance. He is the alternate version of ???. Tainted ??? is unlocked by reaching Home and using the Red Key, Cracked Key, or 1=Soul of Cain to access a special room in one of the walls while playing as ???. He starts with 3 soul hearts, 3 poops, and Hold in the consumable slot.

warunek: Use Red Key (etc.) to open the hidden closet in Home as Eve
opis: Tainted Eve is a character added in The Binding of Isaac: Repentance. She is the alternate version of Eve with ragged hair, no bird, ruined mascara as if crying, and an occasional cosmetic blood trail. Tainted Eve is unlocked by reaching Home and using the Red Key, Cracked Key, or 1=Soul of Cain to access a special room in one of the walls while playing as Eve.

warunek: Use Red Key (etc.) to open the hidden closet in Home as Samson
opis: Tainted Samson is a character added in The Binding of Isaac: Repentance. He is the alternate version of Samson with his hair completely shaved off, except for a large tuft. Tainted Samson is unlocked by reaching Home and using the Red Key, Cracked Key, or 1=Soul of Cain to access a special room in one of the walls while playing as Samson. He starts with 3 red hearts.

warunek: Use Red Key (etc.) to open the hidden closet in Home as Azazel
opis: Tainted Azazel is a character added in The Binding of Isaac: Repentance. He is the alternate version of Azazel. His horns are broken with blood leaking from the left stump, and his wings were cut or ripped off. Tainted Azazel is unlocked by reaching Home and using the Red Key, Cracked Key, or 1=Soul of Cain to access a special room in one of the walls while playing as Azazel.

warunek: Use Red Key (etc.) to open the hidden closet in Home as Lazarus
opis: Tainted Lazarus is a character added in The Binding of Isaac: Repentance. He is the alternate version of Lazarus, playable in two different states: Tainted Lazarus and Dead Tainted Lazarus. Tainted Lazarus has ragged hair and is covered in dirt while Dead Tainted Lazarus has pale white skin, glassy eyes, and is covered in blood. Horizontal scars are noticeable on the wrists of both forms of Tainted Lazarus.

warunek: Use Red Key (etc.) to open the hidden closet in Home as Eden
opis: Tainted Eden is a character added in The Binding of Isaac: Repentance. They are the alternate version of Eden. Unlike other Tainted characters, Tainted Eden has no obvious changes to their physical appearance. Tainted Eden is unlocked by reaching Home and using the Red Key, Cracked Key, or Soul of Cain to access a special room in one of the walls while playing as Eden.

warunek: Use Red Key (etc.) to open the hidden closet in Home as The Lost
Use Red Key (etc.) to open the hidden closet in Home as Lilith
opis: Tainted Lilith is a character added in The Binding of Isaac: Repentance. She is the alternate version of Lilith. Tainted Lilith is unlocked by reaching Home and using the Red Key, Cracked Key, or Soul of Cain to access a special room in one of the walls while playing as Lilith.

warunek: Use Red Key (etc.) to open the hidden closet in Home as Keeper
opis: Tainted Keeper is a character added in The Binding of Isaac: Repentance. He is the alternate version of Keeper. Tainted Keeper is unlocked by reaching Home and using the Red Key, Cracked Key, or 1=Soul of Cain to access a special room in one of the walls while playing as Keeper.

warunek: Use Red Key (etc.) to open the hidden closet in Home as Apollyon
opis: Tainted Apollyon is a character added in The Binding of Isaac: Repentance. He is the alternate version of Apollyon. Tainted Apollyon is unlocked by reaching Home and using the Red Key, Cracked Key, or 1=Soul of Cain to access a special room in one of the walls while playing as Apollyon.

warunek: Use Red Key (etc.) to open the hidden closet in Home as The Forgotten
Use Red Key (etc.) to open the hidden closet in Home as Bethany
opis: Tainted Bethany is a character added in The Binding of Isaac: Repentance. She is the alternate version of Bethany. Tainted Bethany is unlocked by reaching Home and using the Red Key, Cracked Key, or 1=Soul of Cain to access a special room in one of the walls while playing as Bethany.

warunek: Use Red Key (etc.) to open the hidden closet in Home as Jacob and Esau
